data.title: Eric Walters appointed as General Manager of KNOE & KAQY in Monroe, LA by Gray Media, starting September 1, 2025.
data.description: In Atlanta on July 31, 2025, Gray Media announced Eric Walters as the upcoming General Manager of KNOE and KAQY-LD in Monroe, Louisiana. This appointment will be effective from September 1, 2025. KNOE and KAQY-LD are Gray's CBS and ABC affiliates in Monroe.

data.title: Tenable Holdings beats Q2 earnings estimates, reports EPS of 34 cents & sales of $247.29 million. FY25 guidance raised.
data.description: Tenable Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TENB) exceeded expectations in their second-quarter financial report, announcing earnings of 34 cents per share, surpassing the estimated 30 cents per share. The company also revealed a quarterly sales figure of $247.29 million, higher than the anticipated $242.12 million. Tenable raised their FY2025 adjusted EPS guidance from $1.44-$1.52 to $1.45-$1.53 and increased sales guidance from $970.00 million-$980.00 million to $981.00 million-$987.00 million. Co-CEO, Steve Vintz, credited this success to a 12% revenue growth and a 19% operating margin, propelled by the increasing adoption of their exposure management platform by customers.

data.title: Inventor from Darby, Pa. creates new head covering called Royal Priesthood combining hat & durag benefits.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 31, 2025, a resident of Darby, Pennsylvania shared his motivation for creating a unique product. The inventor aimed to combine the advantages of a hat and a durag into one item, resulting in the development of the Royal Priesthood. This innovative design not only enhances style but also simplifies the user experience by consolidating the function of both headwear pieces.

data.title: The Rudolph Libbe Group ranks #1 on Crain's NE Ohio contractor list with highest 2024 revenue.
data.description: In a historic milestone, the multi-trade construction firm based in North Ridgeville, Ohio has secured the top spot in Northeast Ohio as the leading contractor ranked by 2024 revenue. The Rudolph Libbe Group of Companies achieved this prestigious No. 1 ranking for the first time, as announced by Crain's Cleveland Business on July 31, 2025. This significant accomplishment highlights the firm's growth and success, underscoring its position as a key player in the construction industry.

data.title: Adam Emrich appointed VP of Customer Solutions and Sales at Southern Linc effective August 2, 2025. Southern Linc announced via PRNewswire.
data.description: Adam Emrich has been appointed as the Vice President of Customer Solutions and Sales for Southern Linc, a wireless telecommunications subsidiary of Southern Company. This announcement was made on July 31, 2025. Emrich is set to assume his new role on August 2, where he will be responsible for leading the customer and sales organizations. This move is part of a strategic reorganization to enhance service delivery and optimize sales growth within the company.

data.title: Erayak Power Solution Group announces $7 million direct offering for 107,692,307 shares at $0.065 per share.
data.description: In Wenzhou, China, on July 31, 2025, Erayak Power Solution Group Inc. (NASDAQ: RAYA), a prominent manufacturer, designer, and exporter in the power supply sector, has disclosed entering a securities purchase agreement with select institutional investors. The agreement involves the acquisition and sale of a total of 107,692,307 shares of the Company’s Class A ordinary shares, valued at $0.065 per share, in a registered direct offering. Alternatively, pre-funded warrants can be obtained in place of shares at the same purchase price, deducting an exercise price of $0.0001 per share.
NYMEX Diesel August futures settle at $2.3995 a gallon.
NYMEX WTI Crude September futures settle at $69.26 a barrel, down 74 cents, 1.06%.
NYMEX Natural Gas September futures settle at $3.1060/MMBtu.

data.title: Bitcoin consolidates dominance after FOMC meeting; altcoins could see more upside. Fed holds rates steady at 4.5%. Analyst warns altcoins may underperform due to hawkish stance. Fed reaffirms commitment to tightening. Altcoin rally fueled by optimism around easing.
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is maintaining its dominance as the month comes to a close, with analysts predicting potential growth for altcoins. In a recent podcast update, crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen suggested that altcoins could start underperforming Bitcoin by Q4 due to the Federal Reserve's hawkish stance. The Fed decided to keep rates steady at 4.5% in its latest FOMC meeting and reiterated its commitment to quantitative tightening, reducing expectations for immediate rate cuts. Cowen noted that the rally in altcoins was driven by premature optimism surrounding monetary easing, which is now diminishing. He compared the current situation to 2017, highlighting that during tightening cycles, capital typically moves towards lower-risk assets.

data.title: Parkview Health to build $200 million, 40-bed hospital in West Lafayette to serve Tippecanoe County.
data.description: A new health system is set to cater to the expanding population of Tippecanoe County with the construction of a 40-bed hospital, backed by a significant $200 million investment. Parkview Health has announced its plans for the development in West Lafayette, Indiana, which is poised to provide essential healthcare services to the local community. The project highlights a commitment to bolstering the region's medical infrastructure to meet the increasing healthcare needs of residents. Additionally, the Purdue Research Foundation offers supplemental information related to this initiative.

data.title: Figma stock skyrockets during IPO, becoming one of the top IPOs of the year.
data.description: Software design company Figma experienced a significant surge on its debut trading day following its initial public offering. Figma's stock stood out as one of the most notable IPOs of the year. The successful IPO attracted considerable attention from investors, reflecting the company's strong market presence.

data.title: Palantir stock up 111% in 2025. Citi expects revenue beat for Q2 earnings report, shares hit new high.
data.description: After a surge of 111% in 2025, Palantir stock is generating high expectations as the firm prepares to release its Q2 earnings report. Analysts at Citi anticipate a revenue beat. Following this news, Palantir shares reached a new high but later experienced a slight pullback.

data.title: AI data center growth boosts infrastructure firms Vertiv and Applied Digital. Positive outlook.
data.description: The accelerated expansion of AI data centers is proving beneficial for infrastructure companies Vertiv and Applied Digital. This growth in AI data center construction is driving success for these firms, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Reddit stock rallying before Q2 report, focus on user growth. Report due later today.
data.description: Today, Reddit is witnessing an increase in its stock value as investors anticipate its second-quarter earnings report, scheduled for later today. The focus will be on the platform's user growth. This surge in Reddit's stock price comes ahead of the quarterly report, with investors closely monitoring the numbers.

data.title: Lincoln Electric beats earnings estimates, shares surge 9% to 52-week high with strong profit growth. Stock upgrade to 82.
data.description: Lincoln Electric has demonstrated an enhanced price performance, resulting in an upgrade of its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 78 to 82. The company exceeded earnings estimates, leading to a 9% surge in its shares. This increase propelled Lincoln Electric to a 52-week high, reflecting robust profit growth.

Federal Reserve Board joins other federal financial institution regulatory agencies in providing banks the flexibility to use an alternative method for collecting certain customer identification information

data.title: GEMtrust DAO introduces GEM DiCom, a digital commodity backed by gemstone reserves and blockchain transparency.
data.description: GEMtrust DAO has introduced GEM DiCom, a digital commodity challenging the perception of tokenized gemstones versus conventional hard assets. Helmut Bauer, the Chief Marketing Officer, highlighted the decision to focus on gemstones, addressing concerns about their lack of liquidity and transparency compared to assets like gold. According to Bauer, while gold has long been part of financial systems, gemstones have been excluded due to transparency issues. By leveraging blockchain and prioritizing data, GEMtrust aims to address this barrier and allow gemstones to become a part of serious investment portfolios. GEM DiCom stands out as a market-driven digital asset linked transparently to certified gemstone reserves held in Swiss vaults. Unlike stablecoins, GEM DiCom offers investors a unique opportunity within the tokenized commodities landscape.
